dublinCore.dc:title: 119 SRES 784 IS: Prohibiting the buying or selling of certain investments by Senators.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Ossoff submitted the following resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Rules and Administration

form.official-title: Prohibiting the buying or selling of certain investments by Senators.

section.header: Prohibition on buying or selling of certain investments by Senators
section.text: Rule XXXVII of the Standing Rules of the Senate is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating paragraph 16 as paragraph 17; and
by inserting after paragraph 15 the following:
Effective January 1, 2027, no Senator may buy or sell a publicly traded stock or cryptocurrency.
